ThingDef.label: orthodox technique — jade void breathing
ThingDef.description:
A foundational breathing technique attributed to the Jade Void Sect. Each breath follows a precise cycle — inhale for seven counts, hold for four, release for nine. The rhythm trains the dantian to receive qi more efficiently while sharpening the mind.
Small in its demands. Significant in its effects.
This manual is a permanent reference — any orthodox cultivator may study it.
Requires an orthodox cultivation path.

li.floatMenuOptionLabel: Study orthodox technique: jade void breathing

ThingDef.label: orthodox technique — thousand-step
ThingDef.description:
A qi circulation method developed for cultivators who traverse long distances on foot. As the body moves through ten thousand steps, the qi is driven through the meridians in a repeated pattern — the motion itself becomes cultivation.
The mind becomes steady. The dantian becomes efficient. Orthodox cultivators who master this method are rarely at rest for long.
This manual is a permanent reference — any orthodox cultivator may study it.
Requires an orthodox cultivation path.

ThingDef.label: demonic technique — blood furnace
ThingDef.description:
A demonic refinement technique that uses the cultivator's own blood as a medium for qi purification. The blood is "burned" — heated internally by dark qi, forced through the body's meridians under pressure. The process is painful. The results are dramatic.
Written by the Blood Flame Patriarch. One of three known copies, or so the original owner believed.
This manual is a permanent reference — any demonic cultivator may study it.
Requires a demonic cultivation path.

ThingDef.label: demonic technique — soul consumption
ThingDef.description:
The most dangerous technique in this collection. The Soul Consumption Method does not gather qi from the world — it devours it. The cultivator becomes a spiritual predator, their dantian radiating a subtle hunger that draws qi from the surrounding environment.
The power is significant. The cultivator's mental stability becomes negotiable.
This manual is a permanent reference — any demonic cultivator may study it.
Requires a demonic cultivation path.
